narrative:
Canton City 2-A (precinct in Stark County) has 449 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.4 percentage points.
